Bloominglabs' Monthly Board Meeting

I. Called to order at 1801

    A. Attendance: Kevin, Kyle, Calob, Pete

II. Old Business

    A. Digital Ocean Droplet

        1. haven't completely moved off of

        2. nearly done

        3. will cut our spend rate down to approx. $15/month

    B. New Board

        1. Proposed Annual Meeting Date

            a. February 28, 2026

        2. Presidential candidate willing to accept

III. New Business

    A. Liability Waivers

        1. do we need all the pii we collect

            a. Name, Address, Phone Numeber, Signature, Date Signed

        2. Proposed

            b. Name, Email Address, Signature, Date Signed

            c. Name, Email Address/Phone Number, Signature, Date Signed

        3. Wait on more knowledgable advice

IV. Adjourned at 1820
